name: claude-workbench
description: Mike Bronner's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace. Infrastructure for persistent agent identity, memory, and workflow automation.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core infrastructure: persistent agent identity, session lifecycle hooks, operational memory, and meta skills. Customizable agent name and memory path.

plugins.name: dev-pipeline
plugins.description: Calvinball-driven dev pipeline: Miss Wormwood (triage), Moe (dev work), and Tracer Bullet (code review) as subagents. Interactive or unattended dispatch.

plugins.name: bullet-journal
plugins.description: BuJo ritual system: daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly interactive reflections in Apple Notes. Scheduled rituals with on-demand slash commands.
